","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7KFZB5RH322GVSu1Y+5YGbBlpLm/+reT+7nHdmEyLDt","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f51ae0407c5f401ca4ff3150997869eb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530046&x-signature=uwBuFxPJLZgnlMHRJ7Vlp4uLPes%3D","user_id":"3578286516470676","user_name":"筱柒ovo"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3578286516470676","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7095228494832995362","book_info":{"abstract":"【传统网游+电竞比赛+多职业选手群像】
三年前，天才新秀顾轻竹凭借一双轻剑纵横天下、未逢敌手，却在登上职业赛场的前夕遭人陷害，受到禁赛处罚，被迫作别赛场，自此轻剑的传说绝迹于江湖。
三年后，全新网游《国度》公测，昔日天才卷土重来，重回职业赛场，震惊电竞圈，重拾荣耀，夺得联赛冠军。
一个风起云涌的电竞新时代开始了。
国服第一刺客林涵肃：“竹子，当时和我一个宿舍，上下床。”
国服第一轻剑士唐盈：“没有顾轻竹使用轻剑的比赛毫无乐趣。”
三冠王连无阙：“我永远怀念和竹子共同训练的那两年。”
半部网游，半部人生，这是一个充满热血和感动的重返巅峰的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/a29eb051768a35721c52f80efad7130f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"在下顾奈","author_id":"","book_id":"7095228494832995362","book_name":"网游：退役天才返场，震惊电竞圈","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7095257596915155469","read_count":"15859","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3688203"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1204","tags":"游戏体育,天才,网游,单女主,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/36079241ca74a5f9535cd0a0300c4273~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183188&x-signature=W2jj%2BQC06VqK33ILFPpybZmI5uM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2590888930851517","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"173"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201733083BE15E03D0A314063392"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读62小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":91015,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":223090,"reply_count":0,"show_
